name: Vanity case
description:
100% AUTHENTIC Hermès Navy Blue Bolide H Cosmetic Case Makeup Bag Vanity Travel Pouch. Used with so much life left! This has gone through the authenticity screening on Vestiaire. Please ONLY purchase knowing this is in used condition with flaws and having viewed all photos!

 The color looks different depending on the lighting! I took photos w/ & w/o flash! It some lighting, it looks a bit like faded black, but if you look at the flash photos and against black, it’s clearly navy. 

PRICE IS FIRM! NO OFFERS!

- exterior has fading, some discoloration, markings, stains & areas with fabric flaws. There is a small tear at the bottom, it’s not all the way through and the bag is lined so it doesn’t impact use. There is also some tearing around the top edging. This also does not impact the use. 
- There’s discoloration & wear on the leather trim at the bottom. See photos.
- Zipper works, leather additional zipper pull has some wear but works fine! Just a suggestion, bolide bags tend to get fabric caught in the zipper tract when empty so it’s better to keep them a bit full. 

- The inside has some discoloration, markings and some fabric flaws. There are also some sparkles stuck within. I’m sure they can come out. I haven’t tried to clean. See photos!
